title: Unify ActivationType and ActivationName into single ActivationFunction type
description:
Two incompatible activation type unions exist:
- neural-net.ts:10 — `ActivationType = 'relu' | 'sigmoid' | 'tanh'`
- neural-network.ts:31 — `ActivationName = 'relu' | 'sigmoid' | 'tanh' | 'leakyRelu'`

ActivationName is a strict superset of ActivationType. Code accepting ActivationType silently rejects 'leakyRelu'. This is a subset incompatibility that will cause bugs when the implementations are consolidated (MLD-035).

Fix: Create one canonical type:
```typescript
export type ActivationFunction = 'relu' | 'sigmoid' | 'tanh' | 'leakyRelu' | 'softmax' | 'linear';
```
Export from index.ts. Update all consumers.
acceptanceCriteria: Single ActivationFunction type exported from index.ts
neural-net.ts imports and uses this type
neural-network.ts imports and uses this type
MLDesignModule.tsx ACTIVATION_OPTIONS uses this type
No duplicate activation type definitions remain

title: Unify TrainingState and EpochMetrics into single TrainingEpochResult type
acceptanceCriteria: Single TrainingEpochResult type exported from index.ts
Both NN implementations use this type for onEpoch callback
MLDesignModule.tsx trainingLog uses TrainingEpochResult[]
activations field is optional (present in simple NN, absent in advanced)

title: Consolidate Dataset and GeneratedDataset into single format
description:
Two incompatible dataset formats:
- datasets.ts:10 — `Dataset { points: [number,number][]; labels: number[] }` (parallel arrays)
- dataset-generators.ts:16 — `GeneratedDataset { points: DatasetPoint[]; bounds: Bounds }` (object array)

Parallel arrays are error-prone (points[i] must match labels[i]). Object-array format is safer and includes bounds for rendering.

Consolidate to GeneratedDataset format. Update MLDesignModule.tsx to use DatasetPoint[] instead of [number,number][] + number[].

Blocked by MLD-035 (consolidate NN implementations) since the simple NN expects parallel array format.
acceptanceCriteria: Single dataset format used throughout the module
DatasetPoint { x, y, label } is the canonical point type
GeneratedDataset with bounds is the canonical dataset type
datasets.ts either updated or deleted
All visualizations (ScatterPlot, DecisionBoundary) updated to use DatasetPoint

title: Narrow BanditStep.strategy from string to literal union type
acceptanceCriteria: BanditStep.strategy typed as literal union, not string
BanditStrategy type in MLDesignModule.tsx matches the same union
TypeScript catches if a new strategy is added to simulators but not to the union
No runtime behavior change

title: Narrow FeatureStoreStep.action from string to literal union + make TICK_HIGHLIGHTS exhaustive
acceptanceCriteria: FeatureStoreAction literal union defined and exported
FeatureStoreStep.action uses this union
TICK_HIGHLIGHTS typed as Record<FeatureStoreAction, ...>
TypeScript error if a new action is added to feature-store.ts but not TICK_HIGHLIGHTS
TypeScript error if TICK_HIGHLIGHTS has a key not in FeatureStoreAction

title: Replace mode rendering if/else chains with exhaustive switch statements
acceptanceCriteria: All 4 mode rendering locations use exhaustive switch
Adding a new ModuleMode value causes TypeScript errors at all 4 locations
No behavioral change for existing 6 modes
The 'never' exhaustive check pattern used consistently

title: Extract shared BaseStep interface for all simulation step types
acceptanceCriteria: BaseSimulationStep interface with tick + description exported
All 3 step types extend BaseSimulationStep
BanditStep gains a description field (generated in simulator)
Common step rendering can be built on BaseSimulationStep
No runtime behavior change for existing code

title: Narrow PipelineStage.config from Record<string, string|number> to typed configs
acceptanceCriteria: Per-stage-type config interfaces defined
PipelineStage.config typed as union or generic per stage type
Existing template configs validated against their type
TypeScript catches misspelled config keys
Properties panel rendering updated to use typed configs

title: Create dedicated ML Design Zustand store for persistent state
acceptanceCriteria: New ml-design-store.ts with Zustand persist
lastMode and hyperparameter config persisted in localStorage
Returning to ML Design restores last mode and config
Runtime state (training results) NOT persisted
useMLDesignModule hook reads from store instead of useState

title: Rename vague types for clarity: Dataset→ClassificationDataset2D, Layer→NeuralNetLayer, Bounds→SpatialBounds2D
description:
Several type names are vague and could conflict with types from other modules:
- `Dataset` (datasets.ts:10) → `ClassificationDataset2D` (specific to 2D classification)
- `Layer` (neural-net.ts:12) → `NeuralNetLayer` (distinguishes from CNN layers)
- `Bounds` (decision-boundary.ts:14) → `SpatialBounds2D` (specific to 2D spatial bounds)
- `HeatmapProps` (MLDesignModule.tsx:1144) → `DecisionBoundaryProps` (it's not a generic heatmap)

Update barrel exports in index.ts and all consumers.
acceptanceCriteria: All 4 types renamed to more descriptive names
index.ts re-exports updated
All import sites updated
No runtime behavior change
TypeScript compiles cleanly
